channel.title: VS Code on Scoutman
channel.description: Recent content in VS Code on Scoutman

item.title: ⚜️ Azure Runbook Workbench: A Better Way To Build Azure Automation Runbooks In VS Code
item.author: stationsolutions@gmail.com (rodrigo pinto)
item.description: Azure Automation has always been useful, but the development experience around it has often felt more fragmented than it should. Too often, building and maintaining runbooks means bouncing between the Azure portal, local scripts, ad-hoc testing, and deployment steps that live somewhere else entirely. That works, but it rarely feels like a modern engineering workflow.
